To move box at (2,1) upward, I must stand below it at (3,1), which I am not. So first I should reposition toward (3,1). Cell (3,2) is wall, up is open but doesn't help, right is open. I can go right/down/right around to reach below the box via row 5 and column 1. First step: right.
